title: CAD File previews

posts.author: ccioffi (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml: When I click to open the download dialogue on a workspace, the files behave differently. A PDF will show a preview of the PDF before downloading it. A CAD model preview function would be super useful. As it is, you need to download the CAD model to have a visual. The ability to see a thumbnail or preview of a CAD model in the download dialogue would be super useful.
